back_text:
Hard / Expert
[skull] -X. X is 1 more than the current act number.
[tablet] -2. Reveal another token. If you fail, take 1 damage.
[elder_thing] -4. If you fail, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile, if able.
name: Spreading Flames
text:
Easy / Standard
[skull] -X. X is the current act number.
[tablet] -1. Reveal another token. If you fail, take 1 damage.
[elder_thing] -3. If you fail by 2 or more, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile, if able.

back_flavor: The wind carries the scent of smoke from across campus. A plume of flame rises from a nearby building.
back_text: In player order, each investigator tests [willpower] (3). Each investigator who fails takes 1 horror.
flavor: The campus is strangely quiet, and there is no sign of your friend. Hooded figures cross the quad as nervous students scurry under painfully bright streetlamps.
name: Past Curfew
text: [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, discard a Bystander enemy at your location.

back_flavor: Cinders fly through the air above Miskatonic University. The wail of a fire alarm resounds across the quad as dozens of frightened students flee the scene.
back_text:
If they are still set aside, place 4 set-aside copies of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.
In player order, each investigator tests [agility] (3). Each investigator who fails takes 1 damage.
flavor: The sky glows a faint orange as the flames spread.
name: Lit Up
text: [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, discard a Bystander enemy at your location.

back_flavor: Thick, black smoke fills the air around you as you fall to your knees, coughing. Hazy dark shapes move somewhere beyond the roaring flames. Try as you might, you cannot pull yourself to safety. Your vision swims as you lose consciousness.
back_text: Each surviving investigator who has not resigned is defeated and suffers 1 physical trauma.
name: Wild Flames
text: [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, discard a Bystander enemy at your location. Forced - After doom is placed on the agenda: The lead investigator draws the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile

back_flavor: You find your friend's satchel, scorched with a stylized emblem of an open palm. Wherever your friend is, you imagine they didn't go willingly. As you turn to leave, you are confronted by a masked figure wreathed in flame. As the room erupts into flames around you, they let out a chilling wail.
back_text:
Discard each enemy in play.
Put the set-aside Dormitories and Miskatonic Quad locations into play. Spawn the set-aside Servant of Flame enemy at the Dormitories.
Attach 1 set-aside copy of Fire! to Your Friend's Room. Place each other set-aside copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.
flavor: You are searching the dormitories for any sign of your friend.
name: Where There's Smoke...
text: Objective - At the end of the round, investigators may spend the requisite clues, as a group, to advance.

back_flavor: You emerge from the dormitories, lungs bursting, into the crisp autumn evening. Looking behind, there is no trace of your pursuer. You remember your friend planned to consult Miskatonic University's head librarian, Dr. Henry Armitage. He may be able to help you understand what is going on.
back_text: Search all in-play and all out-of-play areas for the Servant of Flame, heal all damage from them, and set them aside, out of play. Discard each enemy in play. Discard all tokens and attachments from Your Friend's Room and remove it from the game. Put each remaining set-aside location (Orne Library, Science Hall, Warren Observatory) into play.
flavor: A burning apparition stands between you and the exit. You must escape the dormitories!
name: Escape the Dorms
text: Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at Miskatonic Quad, advance. (Hint: Somcetimes it's better to run than to fight!)

back_flavor:
You find Dr. Armitage barricaded in one of Orne Library's lecture halls.
"Some on campus have been acting strange lately, your friend among them. But all of that can wait. We must confront your pursuer and stop them before the entire campus burns!" Dr. Armitage says.
back_text: Put the set-aside Dr. Henry Armitage story asset into play under any investigator's control. He does not take up an ally slot during this scenario. Put the set-aside Servant of Flame enemy into play at Miskatonic Quad. Place 3 [per_investigator] clues on Miskatonic Quad. The lead investigator must search the encounter deck and discard pile for 1 [per_investigator] copies of Fire! and draw them. (Shuffle the encounter deck if it was searched.)
flavor: Your friend had mentioned visiting the head librarian, Dr. Henry Armitage. With more and more strange figures arriving, you must scour the campus for his whereabouts.
name: Searching for Dr. Armitage
text: Objective - At the end of the round, investigators at Orne Library may spend the requisite clues, as a group, to advance.

back_flavor: Your nightmarish pursuer reels back, clutching both hands to their head, as if trying to pry their mask off. The sound of sirens in the distance grows louder. You turn to see a gaggle of terrified students rush past you. When you turn your attention back to your flaming nemesis, they have vanished into thin air.
flavor: Your fiery nemesis can't be allowed to hurt more innocents! With Dr. Armitage's help, perhaps you can stop them.
name: Blaze of Glory
text: [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Deal 1 [per_investigator] damage to an enemy at your location. [action]: Resign. You flee the burning campus. (This does not provoke attacks of opportunity.) Objective - If the Servant of Flame is defeated: Advance.

back_flavor: Your friend's room is in utter disarray. But are these signs of a weary mind, or of some kind of struggle?
flavor: The dorm is quickly filling with smoke.
name: Your Friend's Room
text: [action]: Engage. Choose an enemy at a connecting location. That enemy moves to this location and engages you. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Servant of Flame
text: Hunter. Prey (lowest [agility]). Retaliate.

flavor: "I've seen more than my share of strange occurrences."
name: Dr. Henry Armitage
text:
You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect].
The first action you perform each round does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

back_text:
Hard / Expert
[skull] -X. X is 2 more than the total number of [[Elite]] enemies in the victory display and under the act.
[cultist] -3. If this is a test targeting an [[Elite]] enemy, reveal another token.
[tablet] -4. If you fail, place 1 of your clues on your location.
[elder_thing] -2 for each clue you control.
name: Smoke and Mirrors
text:
Easy / Standard
[skull] -X. X is the total number of [[Elite]] enemies in the victory display and under the act.
[cultist] -1. If this is a test targeting an [[Elite]] enemy, reveal another token.
[tablet] -3. If you fail, place 1 of your clues on your location.
[elder_thing] -1 for each clue you control.

back_flavor: An itch you've done your best to ignore becomes unbearable. Pulling back your sleeve reveals a patch of peeling gray skin. Gingerly, you scratch the dead skin to reveal a smooth scar, almost as though you were branded. The scar resembles a hand with an unblinking eye inset into it. Touching it gives you a warm, heady feeling, like being drunk.
back_text: One at a time, each investigator draws 1 copy of the set-aside Mark of Elokoss weakness. Each investigator is now the bearer of that weakness. <i>(Add that card to that investigator's deck, ignoring deckbuilding restrictions. It does not count toward that investigator's deck size.
flavor: An unnatural haze fills the streets of Arkham. Some of the locals say the hills west of Arkham are burning. Despite the cool autumn weather, the city streets feel unnaturally warm as evening falls.
name: Arkham Alive
text: [action]: Resign. You return to compare notes with Dr. Armitage on your friend's whereabouts.

back_flavor: You check your watch and realize it is already half past 11. Cursing, you hail a cab to make your way to Easttown.
back_text: Each investigator immediately resigns.
flavor: Steam rises off of the wet pavement, as though the ground beneath it were actually burning.
name: Emergent Evils
text: [action]: Resign. You return to compare notes with Dr. Armitage on your friend's whereabouts.

back_flavor: Your search has turned up some interesting results. With all that you've learned, you and Dr. Armitage should have enough clues to find your friend's whereabouts. You hail a cab back to Easttown to discuss your findings.
flavor: You must find the whereabouts of the suspects on your friend's list.
name: Augurs of Flame
text: [action] Spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Draw the facedown card beneath your location. Objective - If there are a total of 6 [[Elite]] enemies in the victory display and/or under the act, advance. (Hint: Either defeat the suspects by force or resolve their codex entries to generate leads for your investigation!)

name: Mark of Elokoss
text: Revelation - Put Mark of Elokoss into play in your threat area. Forced - When your turn ends: Take 1 damage. Assign that damage to an asset you control, if able. [action][action]: Discard Mark of Elokoss.

name: Servant of Flame
text: Elusive. Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - When Servant of Flame is defeated: ([codex] Ф)

back_text:
Hard / Expert
[skull] -X. X is twice the number of Fire! treacheries in play.
[cultist] -3. If this is an attack or evasion targeting a [[Cultist]] enemy, reveal another token.
[tablet] -4. If you are at a [[Ritual Site]] location, you automatically fail instead.
[elder_thing] -5. If you fail, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.
name: Queen of Ash
text:
Easy / Standard
[skull] -X. X is the number of Fire! treacheries in play.
[cultist] -2. If this is an attack or evasion targeting a [[Cultist]] enemy, reveal another token.
[tablet] -2 (-4 instead if you are at a [[Ritual Site]] location).
[elder_thing] -3. If you fail, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.

back_flavor: From somewhere deep within the bowels of the city, a searing flame grows in intensity. Those who bear the mark of the queen arise to herald her return.
back_text:
If the Servant of Flame enemy is set aside, spawn it at Underground Cistern.
Each investigator must test [willpower] (4). Each investigator who fails takes 1 direct horror.
flavor: Chanting echoes through the fetid tunnels. The cult's rebirth is at hand!
name: A Gathering
text: Each enemy at a location with a copy of Fire! attached cannot be damaged.

back_text:
If it is act 1:
Hungry flames spread through the tunnels, and the chants below intensify. You were too late to stop the summoning.
Reveal Underground Cistern and spawn Elokoss at it, (Mother of Flame) side faceup. Replace the current act and agenda with special agenda 3a: Brethren of Ash. It is both the current act and the current agenda.
Otherwise:
The ancient queen of ash awakens with a horrific wail.
Flip Elokoss to her (Mother of Flame) side, keeping all damage and attachments on her. Replace the current act and agenda with special agenda 3a: Brethren of Ash. It is both the current act and the current agenda.
flavor: The air is choked with noxious smoke as the sounds of chanting grow louder.
name: A Ritual
text: Each enemy at a location with a copy of Fire! attached cannot be damaged.

back_flavor:
A knotted, claw-like hand grabs your arm as dozens more wrap around you, embracing you. The touch burns. You scream as a horrifying, toothy maw opens in Elokoss' belly.
"Don't worry. She only wants to honor you," says a familiar voice.
You look behind you to see your friend wearing the same black and red robes as the rest of the Brethren of Ash. They grin at you as tongues of flame billow out from the burning maw, enveloping you in a cocoon of fire. The last thing you hear as you are pulled into the white-hot inferno in Elokoss' chest is your friend - along with the rest of the cult - singing a lilting, off-key hymn for your rebirth.
back_text: Each investigator is killed.
name: Brethren of Ash
text: Forced - When doom would be placed on a card: Each investigator takes 1 direct damage, instead. Forced - If each remaining investigator is defeated: Advance. Objective - If Elokoss is defeated, (→R1) (page 13).

back_flavor: The chanting leads you through a labyrinth of tunnels to a dry cistern. Several dozen robed figures kneel before a burning birch tree, chanting. Your friend is among them. You must stop them before they sacrifice themselves for Elokoss!
back_text: Spawn the set-aside Elokoss enemy at Underground Cistern, (Faint Embers) side faceup. The investigator at Underground Cistern draws one of the set-aside Fire! treacheries. Shuffle each other copy of Fire! into the encounter deck, along with the set-aside Queen's Knight and Herald of Flame enemies. Put the set-aside Sluice Control location into play.
flavor: The Brethren of Ash could be anywhere. You must search the sewers for the cult's ritual site if you hope to save your friend.
name: Search the Sewers
text: Objective - When an investigator enters Underground Cistern, advance.

back_flavor: As you chop the burning tree to tinder, an unearthly howl fills the room. Ignoring it, you continue your attack, placing well-timed strike after well-timed strike to destroy the ancient evil. Eventually, the former effigy of the Brethren's goddess lies in pieces.
flavor: You must stop the rite at any cost. You could scour the cistern for a means to stop the cult, or you could try to chop their profane idol to tinder!
name: Stop the Rite
text: [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Discard a copy of Fire! at your location. Forced - When the round ends: Each [[Cultist]] enemy moves once toward Underground Cistern. Objective/b> - If Elokoss is defeated, advance.

back_flavor: Strange chants echo through the tunnels, hinting at the location of the cult's lair.
back_text: As an additional cost to enter Underground Cistern, investigators must spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.
name: Underground Cistern
text: Forced - If there are no clues on Underground Cistern: Place clues (from the token pool) on it up to its clue value. Forced - When the investigation phase ends: Discard each ready non-[[Elite]] [[Cultist]] enemy at this location. Place 1 doom on the agenda for each enemy discarded in this way.

back_flavor: A narrow passage leads out of the cistern up to a locked door. Although the sluice gate hasn't been opened in years, the ensuing flood might be enough to wipe out everything in the sewers - including you.
back_text: As an additional cost to enter Sluice Control, investigators must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.
flavor: There's no better time to be a hero.
name: Sluice Control
text: [action]: "Stop them at all costs!" You try to open the sluice valve. Test [agility] or [combat] (5). If you succeed, each enemy is defeated and each investigator who has not resigned is killed (→R3) (page 14)

flavor:
"And so shall ye be remade: a burnt offering to her glory and a symbol of the ecstasy that awaits us all."
- Edict of Ash, Vol III
name: Ashen Rebirth
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, you must either take 2 direct damage or 2 direct horror (whichever you have more of).

name: Queen's Knight
text: Hunter. Forced - When Queen's Knight takes 1 or more damage: Deal 1 damage to Elokoss.

name: Herald of Flame
text: Hunter. Forced - After this enemy attacks: Heal 1 damage from each enemy at its location.

name: Elokoss
text: Massive. Retaliate. Elokoss gets +5 [per_investigator] health, cannot move, and cannot make attacks of opportunity. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Place 1 clue on Elokoss. If Elokoss has 5 clues on her, (→R2) (page 14).

name: Elokoss
text: Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Elokoss gets +5 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After you evade Elokoss: Ready her. She cannot attack you for the remainder of the round.

name: Servant of Flame
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - When Servant of Flame is defeated: ([codex] Ф)

name: Collector
text:
Permanent. Reward. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase only at deck creation.
You get +5 deck size.
Your investigator's Deckbuilding Options gains: "one other [[Relic]] or [[Charm]] asset of any class ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], [survivor]) level 0-3."
